ddls:
CREATE TABLE "predictors" (
  "predictor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictor */,
  "predictor_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictor */,
  "predictor_type" TEXT /* Type of the predictor (e.g., human expert, machine learning model) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the predictor (e.g., sports network, university) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the predictor in years */,
  "photo" TEXT /* Photo of the predictor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the predictor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the predictor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the predictor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("predictor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "predictor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictor who made the prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game or event being predicted */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number of the prediction */,
  "prediction_value" TEXT /* Value of the prediction (e.g., team name, score) */,
  "actual_outcome" TEXT /* Actual outcome of the game or event */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the predictor in their prediction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments provided by the predictor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_predictor_id FOREIGN KEY ("predictor_id") REFERENCES predictors ("predictor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game or event */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game or event */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport of the game (e.g., football, basketball) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League of the game (e.g., NFL, NBA) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season that the game belongs to */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., regular season, playoff, championship) */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the game was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the game was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "predictor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictor associated with the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., accuracy, consistency, total points) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_period" TEXT /* Period of the metric (e.g., weekly, monthly, season) */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the metric in the overall performance calculation */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the metric */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_predictor_id FOREIGN KEY ("predictor_id") REFERENCES predictors ("predictor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the leaderboard (e.g., overall, weekly) */,
  "leaderboard_period" TEXT /* Period of the leaderboard (e.g., weekly, monthly, season) */,
  "ranking_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for ranking predictors in the leaderboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the leaderboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the leaderboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaderboard the entry belongs to */,
  "predictor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictor in the leaderboard */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the predictor in the leaderboard */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points or score of the predictor in the leaderboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_entries_predictor_id FOREIGN KEY ("predictor_id") REFERENCES predictors ("predictor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_entries_leaderboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("leaderboard_id") REFERENCES leaderboards ("leaderboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, public user) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio or description of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, view leaderboard) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance analysis, trend analysis) */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report */,
  "report_tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords for the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report (e.g., text, charts, tables) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the report access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user on the report (e.g., viewed, downloaded, shared) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictor_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictor affiliation */,
  "predictor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictor */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization the predictor is affiliated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the predictor within the organization */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of the affiliation (e.g., current, past) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the affiliation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the affiliation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictor_affiliations_predictor_id FOREIGN KEY ("predictor_id") REFERENCES predictors ("predictor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_details" (
  "game_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game detail */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game or event */,
  "team_a" TEXT /* Name of Team A */,
  "team_b" TEXT /* Name of Team B */,
  "score_a" INTEGER /* Score of Team A */,
  "score_b" INTEGER /* Score of Team B */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the game detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the game detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_details_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
